refs: Reyes et al. 2010 (E_G ~ 0.39 +- 0.06, consistent with GR)
note: A 2.2-6.7% slip is inside current weak-lensing error bars (~10-30% on isotropic slip-type parameters; E_G consistent with GR), so it is CONSISTENT but NOT YET TESTED. Euclid (~1%) is the discriminating instrument. Moreover the DEV-V slip is DIRECTIONAL (anisotropic, filament/edge-aligned) -- a signature existing isotropic analyses do not target. Non-discriminating with present data.
